transcript: Hello everyone. Thank you. Thank you for Solana for organizing this great conference. I'm Adam, I'm a co-founder at Backed Finance. We are the issuer of xStocks. And I want to tell you about the revolution of xStocks and how we're changing financial markets. So we actually announced xStocks just in May on another great Solana conference at Solana Accelerate, as a partnership between Backed and Kraken. But it was important for us that xStocks will not be just let's say one exchange or one wallet product but an ecosystem play. So we have an amazing ecosystem of many, many partners that really make xStocks alive. And you see here players like Bybit, like Gate, like Kamino, like Raydium, Solflare, Phantom, ByReal. And in the past five months since we've launched xStocks, because of this amazing ecosystem, we were able to grow so much. You can see that we've crossed 180 million AUM, dollars in AUM. We've crossed 12 billion in CEX and DEX volume. And for me, the most important metric I think is actually 50,000 unique holders. And that's really amazing and changing finance. So last week we actually announced that Backed is joining the Kraken family and Kraken acquires Backed, acquired Backed. And we believe this will help us makes the next big leap in order to change finance and give us the right resources in order to grow xStocks. And what I want to do today is I want to share with you our plans for 2026 and what we're building. And I want to start by splitting the market, I like to split the markets into three segments. The first is the audience that we have here, the crypto natives, the builders, they're the most important obviously. On top of that we have the underbanked or underserved, people that don't have good access to financial assets. And the last ones are actually the institutions. So I'll share with you what we're planning for each of these segments and let's start with the crypto natives. So the first thing I want to announce is that as of today we're launching xBridge, which is our bridge for xStocks to move between chains. And this is in a partnership with Chainlink based on CCIP infrastructure. And we believe this is one of the things that can make xStocks more usable on-chain. The next thing I want to share with you, and this is the most important slide, so if you take something from this talk please take this one, is composed products. So you have, you know, vanilla xStocks, you can hold things like TeslaX, SPYX, you can trade them. But, you know, what we want to see is we want to see people, like the builders here, so building the second layer on top of xStocks, so products that are actually built on top of xStocks. And I have two great examples here. One is Kamino Multiply where you can actually build positions like 3x TeslaX or 3x SPYX. And we really want to see more of these kind of products. The second example that I have here that is actually launching today is Lore MAG-7 basket, which is, you know, like a MAG-7 ETF on-chain. And you can actually get this via Jupiter or something like that. And this is really amazing and we're starting to see this second layer of products built on top of xStocks. So if you're builders, as I know you are, and if you want to build on top of xStocks, please contact us and we will do whatever we can in order to help you. Going back to the three segments that I spoke about, I want to go back and talk about the underbanked or the underserved. So these people, they don't have good access to financial assets, but what, you know, they're like Web2 users, they're not crypto natives. But many of them, they have Telegram. So we are doubling down on our partnership with the wallet inside Telegram. And for the first time these people will have access to traditional financial assets and we believe this can change their life. So, I don't know if you've tried it but, you know, the wallet inside Telegram has already these assets and it works, the UX is really amazing. The last thing I want to share today and announce is xPort. So going back to institutions, until today issuance and redemption of xStocks was only against, you know, stablecoins or fiat. So people would send us let's say USDC and we would kind of issue them new xStocks. And together with Alpaca we created a feature which we call xPort where big players, our clients, institutions can actually send us shares in kind and we give them xStocks and vice versa for redemption. And we believe that this is really, can bring the institutions into the xStocks ecosystem and change the world and, you know, what we call here in Solana internet capital markets. And that's it guys. Thank you very much.

sources.title: Kraken to acquire Backed, accelerating xStocks expansion and unlocking global demand for tokenized equities

Kraken to acquire Backed, accelerating xStocks expansion and unlocking global demand for tokenized equities - Kraken Blog Kraken Blog
# [![Kraken Blog](https://i0.wp.com/blog.kraken.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/06/New-Lockups%402x.png?fit=214%2C64&ssl=1)](https://blog.kraken.com/)

December 2, 2025|[News](https://blog.kraken.com/category/news)
# Kraken to acquire Backed, accelerating xStocks expansion and unlocking global demand for tokenized equities
The Backed acquisition strengthens our tokenized asset leadership and marks a key milestone toward making global capital markets open, accessible and borderless.
### Share this:
* [Click to share on X (Opens in new window)X](https://blog.kraken.com/news/backed-acquisition?share=twitter)
* [Click to share on Facebook (Opens in new window)Facebook](https://blog.kraken.com/news/backed-acquisition?share=facebook)
* ![](https://i0.wp.com/blog.kraken.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/xStocks-Backed-Annoucement-Blog.png?fit=3070%2C1400&ssl=1)
We are excited to announce we have agreed to acquire[Backed Finance AG](https://backed.fi/), the company driving the issuance of[xStocks](https://xstocks.com/), the leading industry standard for tokenized equities. The acquisition will accelerate the global adoption of xStocks; unifying issuance, trading and settlement to power open capital markets infrastructure for everyone.
xStocks has seen exceptional adoption since its debut earlier in 2025, surpassing $10 billion in combined exchange and onchain trading volume within six months. This acquisition gives Backed access to the capital and resources needed to scale faster and capitalize on surging adoption and growing institutional demand for tokenized equities.
Bringing Backed fully into our ecosystem also allows greater alignment on strategy and investment priorities, unlocking the full economic potential of xStocks.
Together, Kraken and Backed will accelerate xStocks’ expansion, bringing tokenized equities to new markets and extending their reach into everyday financial experiences. The acquisition lays the groundwork for future innovation in tokenized assets beyond equities, advancing our leadership in building open, interoperable financial infrastructure.
xStocks currently offers exposure to more than 60 tokenized equities and ETFs backed 1:1 by the underlying asset. The tokens are live on Solana and Ethereum, with integrations on TON, Tron, Mantle and BNB Chain coming soon.
Investors can trade 24 hours a day, five days a week on Kraken, or directly onchain 24/7, creating a seamless, continuous bridge between traditional and crypto markets. xStocks can be self-custodied and were designed for multi-chain composability, keeping the infrastructure open and usable across the broader ecosystem.
Through the xStocks Alliance, Kraken and Backed have built a thriving ecosystem of partners spanning blockchain foundations, trading venues, and consumer applications. With this acquisition, we plan to further expand this ecosystem, enhancing interoperability and liquidity for tokenized equities across the industry.
**Arjun Sethi, Kraken Co-CEO**: “Integrating Backed into Kraken strengthens the core architecture required for open and programmable capital markets. Unifying issuance, trading and settlement under one framework ensures the infrastructure for tokenized assets remains transparent, reliable and globally accessible. This is foundational work for the next era of market structure. This is bigger than giving people exposure to U.S. equities, it’s about redefining what it means to own assets in the digital era.”
Backed’s team and infrastructure will become part of Kraken, strengthening issuance and compliance capabilities while expanding the reach and utility of tokenized assets beyond the crypto ecosystem

[News](https://ambcrypto.com/category/new-news/)# Base–Solana bridge goes live: How it reshapes a $9.15B on-chain economy
3min Read
Base integrates Solana with Chainlink CCIP, ensuring secure cross‑chain transfers through multi‑layered validator verification.
Posted:December 5, 2025
By:[Ishika Kumari](https://ambcrypto.com/author/ishika-kumari/)
Journalist
Edited By:[Jacob Thomas](https://ambcrypto.com/author/jacob-thomas/)
![Base- Solana bridge](https://ambcrypto.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Base-Solana-bridge-1200x675.webp)
[Ishika Kumari](https://ambcrypto.com/author/ishika-kumari/)
Journalist
Edited By:[Jacob Thomas](https://ambcrypto.com/author/jacob-thomas/)
Posted:December 5, 2025

**
Coinbase’s Layer‑2 network, Base, has officially integrated with the Solana ecosystem, enabling seamless transfers of SOL and other Solana assets across chains.
This connection is powered by the new Base–Solana bridge, which utilizes Chainlink’s CCIP and runs on Coinbase’s infrastructure.
With this upgrade, Base shifts from being just an Ethereum-focused L2 to a major liquidity hub. This allows users and developers to move assets and build across both Base and[Solana [SOL]](https://ambcrypto.com/predictions/solana-price-prediction)with far less friction.
## **Base – Solana bridge**
Remarking on the same, the Coinbase-launched network wrote on a blog[post](https://blog.base.org/base-solana-bridge),
> “To build a global economy, we need to make it interoperable and connected; and being a bridge, not an island, has been a core value of Base since day one.”
The new bridge prioritizes security and reliability by using a multi‑layered verification model. In this model, Coinbase and Chainlink CCIP node operators act as independent validators.
Each validator verifies all messages before finalizing any token transfer between Base and Solana.
Johann Eid, Chief Business Officer at Chainlink Labs, also commented on the development, stating:
> “By leveraging Chainlink CCIP as the cross-chain infrastructure securing the Base-Solana Bridge, Base enables developers to build the most secure cross-chain applications and move the industry toward a reliable interoperability standard.”
This robust defense mechanism is crucial given the high value of cross-chain assets.
## **What has already been done?**
Several prominent decentralized applications (dApps), including Zora, AerodromeFi, Virtuals, Flaunch, and RelayProtocol, have already started rolling out the new functionality, making it immediately available to users.
Through this integration, Base now supports native trading and utility for a wide range of Solana assets, including SOL and memecoins such as CHILLHOUSE and TRENCHER.
This advancement unifies liquidity across both ecosystems, enabling builders to support Solana tokens directly. At the same time, it gives communities access to liquidity that was previously divided between Solana and EVM chains.
Eid added,
> “This is how onchain finance scales to securely support global mar

tags.impact_reason: Backed Finance launching xBridge in partnership with Chainlink and its acquisition by Kraken could significantly increase the adoption of tokenized equities within the Solana DeFi ecosystem.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a crystal prism as the Semantic Anchor because it perfectly visualizes the core concept of 'in-kind share porting' and the 'Chainlink-powered bridge.' A prism is a fundamental optical component that takes a singular input (a beam of light representing a share) and transforms it into a complex, composable output (a spectrum of light representing the tokenized asset). This directly mirrors the story's theme of creating a 'composable primitive' from a Real World Asset. I included the diegetic text '1:1' laser-etched onto the prism's surface to represent the direct, one-to-one conversion that removes intermediaries, a key aspect of this new capital-efficient infrastructure.
visual_idea.description: A massive, flawlessly cut crystal prism stands in the center of a cavernous, minimalist hall made of polished obsidian. A single, solid beam of white light, representing a traditional share, enters the prism from the left. As it passes through, the text '1:1' subtly etched on a facet of the prism is illuminated from within. The beam then refracts and exits on the right, transforming into a complex, branching network of vibrant, iridescent light threads—the composable tokenized asset. The background is dark and deep, with the refracted light casting intricate caustic patterns on the floor and distant walls.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, flawlessly cut crystalline prism dominates the center of a vast, minimalist hall, its surfaces crafted from highly polished, brushed obsidian. A single, powerful beam of solid white light, symbolic of a traditional share, enters the prism from the left. As the light passes through, the numbers '1:1' are subtly etched onto a facet of the prism, glowing with an internal illumination. The beam then dramatically refracts and emerges from the right, transforming into an elaborate, branching network of vibrant, iridescent light threads, representing a composable tokenized asset. The background recedes into a profound, dark abyss, with the refracted light intricately casting mesmerizing caustic patterns across the polished obsidian floor and distant cavernous walls. Emphasize epic scale, towering height, and expansive negative space above the prism to enhance its monumental presence. Volumetric lighting permeates the scene, creating a sense of depth and atmosphere. This is a hyperrealistic, photoreal detail, 8K ultra-detailed 3D rendering with ray-traced optics and physically based rendering (PBR), featuring realistic materials, global illumination, ambient occlusion, and cinematic contrast.

visual_idea.description: A dramatic macro shot focusing on the point where the single beam of structured light penetrates the surface of the crystal prism. The image captures the explosive moment of refraction, where the light begins to split into a thousand digital, colorful threads inside the flawless glass. The focus is on the interplay between the sharp, geometric lines of the prism and the organic chaos of the light within, highlighting the beautiful complexity of the conversion.

The image captures the explosive, hyperrealistic moment of refraction, where the brilliant light begins to split into a thousand digital, colorful, data sculpture-like threads that intricately weave and expand within the flawless glass. The focus is on the dynamic interplay between the sharp, geometric lines of the prism and the organic chaos of the light's internal dispersion, highlighting the beautiful complexity of the conversion. The prism rests on a darkly textured Brushed Obsidian surface, providing a stark, elegant contrast. Composed for a perfect square aspect ratio (1:1), with strong symmetry and central focus, the tight macro framing fills the entire frame with intricate details and textures. Volumetric lighting casts a cinematic glow, emphasizing the light rays and internal scattering. 8K ultra-detailed, Octane render, raytracing, physically based rendering (PBR), hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic contrast, subtle depth-of-field, realistic materials, studio lighting.

editorial.headline: Backed Unveils In-Kind Share Porting and Chainlink-Powered Bridge
editorial.standfirst: The introduction of direct share-to-token conversion marks a critical evolution in capital efficiency for institutional on-chain arbitrage. By removing stablecoin intermediaries, this infrastructure update positions tokenized equities as a composable primitive rather than a mere synthetic wrapper.
key_takeaways: New 'xPort' facility with **Alpaca** allows institutions to mint **xStocks** by depositing underlying shares directly, bypassing stablecoin conversion.
**xBridge** launches immediately utilizing **Chainlink CCIP**, enabling cross-chain liquidity for tokenized assets beyond Solana.
**Lore** introduces the 'MAG-7' basket, a composed on-chain ETF product, signaling the maturation of a secondary derivatives market.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
The integration of traditional equity markets with on-chain liquidity has historically faced a significant friction point: the requirement to convert fiat or equities into stablecoins before minting tokenized assets. **Backed Finance**, now operating under the **Kraken** umbrella following its recent acquisition, has effectively dismantled this barrier with the launch of **xPort**. Developed in partnership with **Alpaca**, this mechanism allows institutions to issue and redeem **xStocks** in kind. This capability is a massive unlock for arbitrage desks and asset managers, allowing them to port existing share inventories directly onto the blockchain without triggering taxable interactions with fiat gateways or incurring stablecoin slippage.

Simultaneously, the protocol is addressing liquidity fragmentation through the immediate deployment of **xBridge**. Leveraging **Chainlink's** Cross-Chain Interoperability Protocol (CCIP), Backed is ensuring that the $180 million in assets under management are not siloed within a single ecosystem. This move is essential for the "Internet Capital Markets" thesis, transforming tokenized stocks from static holdings into fluid collateral that can move seamlessly between high-frequency trading environments on Solana and liquidity centers on other chains.

The ecosystem is also witnessing the emergence of a sophisticated application layer built atop these primitives. The launch of the **Lore** MAG-7 basket—effectively an on-chain ETF for major tech stocks—and leveraged positions via **Kamino Multiply** demonstrate that developers are moving beyond simple tokenization. They are reconstructing complex financial products using **xStocks** as the base layer. With over $12 billion in trading volume recorded in just six months, the market is signaling strong demand for these composable, programmable equity instruments.
